command: Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; if (-not (Get-Process chrome -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Output 'Chrome is NOT running' } else { Write-Output 'Chrome IS running' }
description: التحقق من حالة Chrome - هل يعمل حالياً وما هي النوافذ المفتوحة
